board.race_name: WATCH PGR ON SKY SPORTS RACING STAKES
THE FUTURE OF RACING PGR TV STAKES
SPORTSBET SUPPORTERS OF HAVING A CRACK
PRIX DE LA SOURCE DE BUGLOSE
FERNESS @ SIRES ON ICE MAX 150 PTS
HOMING DOGS WITH HOME RUN HOUNDS STAKES

G:MEA:7:2026-07-08.comment: 8. SEGER hit the ground running with a slick early sectional but ran over late and missed the frame when a 2.25 lengths fourth (38.41) over 660m at Bendigo. Has claims if he runs up to expectations. 2. SOCIALISM missed the frame and was safely held latest finishing 6th at Ballarat following on from a third place finish (30.75) at this track the start prior. Should be about the money. 4. GLOWING ETHICS has been mixing form lately, hitting the frame two back before finishing sixth (35.26) at Sandown in a Grade 5. Expecting significant improvement this line-up. 5. TO PERU won by a wide margin last start. Hard to beat again.

runners.name: SEGER
runners.comment: Found some support last start but struggled and finished 4th over 660m at Bendigo beaten 2.25 lengths (38.41) behind Balding Sandy in a Restricted WIN H on June 5. Placed two back at Warrnambool. Capable of improvement on latest effort. Well placed and should feature.

runners.name: TO PERU
runners.comment: Good performance after tracking the speed to win by 1.75 lengths at Warragul over 460m (26.43) beating She's Salty in Rank Limit - Grade 5 on July 2. Ran one of the fastest times on the program in her latest win. Stay with her.

runners.name: SOCIALISM
runners.comment: Won over this track and trip. Last start finished 6th in a Restricted WIN on July 1 over 545m at Ballarat behind Starborn beaten 20 lengths (32.51). Capable of improvement on latest effort. Well placed and should feature.

runners.name: GLOWING ETHICS
runners.comment: Missed the frame last time but finished in the minors at big odds two back when second (34.98) over 600m at this track. Tough draw to overcome but is among the better hopes.

runners.name: MISS JECKELL
runners.comment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (35.42) in a Grade 5, finishing a 3 length fifth. Goes very well from the draw boasting three victories and six places from 15 starts. Looking to others.

runners.name: GREYSYND BONNIE
runners.comment: Missed the frame last time but was in the minors two on end prior to that, the most recent when second (30.53) over 525m at this track. Tough draw to overcome and will need the right run to feature.

G:CNP:2:2026-07-08.comment: 7. IMPRESS CARMEN looks close to another win after hitting the frame in a 6 length third (22.48) in a Novice race at this track. Racing well and deserves a win. 8. ORANA JET copped a check in the run and finished a well held 8 lengths fourth (22.66) last time in a Novice race at this track over 381m. Key player if finds best. 5. STUBBORN MOUSE has been in the money at her last two runs, most recently when second (22.21) in a Novice race over 381m at this track. Well placed here and can atone this time. 2. ELECTRIC KUNA is new to this distance but cannot be left out.

runners.name: ORANA JET
runners.comment: Was a winner three back at this track then finished in the minors before missing the frame last time when fourth (22.66) at this track. Well placed here and expected to bounce back.

runners.name: IMPRESS CARMEN
runners.comment: Well supported last time and gave a sight after a scorching early split but could only manage third, finishing 6 lengths back (22.48) over 381m at this track. Expected to go very well.

runners.name: ATHENIAN BLADE
runners.comment: Last start finished sixth on June 30 over 400m at Mandurah behind Chi Chi Doll, beaten 6 lengths (23.11) in a Novice race. Shouldn't trouble the top few hopes.

runners.name: STUBBORN MOUSE
runners.comment: Working her way into winning form after claiming her maiden success on May 27 at this track over 381m. Last start was second over 381m in 22.21, behind Send It Alfie. Forward showing expected.

runners.name: ELECTRIC KUNA
runners.comment: Ended last campaign with a fifth (35.33) in a NOV at this track and returns after a ten weeks break. Capable of playing a big role.

runners.name: MILWAUKEE MATES
runners.comment: Finished second last start (17.44) at big odds over 300m at Mandurah. Gets the rails draw this time. Cannot be ruled out.

runners.name: MATTE BLACK
runners.comment: Needs to do more than recent efforts, the latest a sixth over 488m at Mandurah. This looks too tough.

runners.name: BAND FOR BAND
runners.comment: Has finished last in her last couple of starts, most recently at this track over 381m. Capable of much better. Worth keeping safe.

H:RED:8:2026-07-08.comment: 5. FAN THE FLAME finished seventh last start over 1660m at Albion Park, beaten 21 metres, after a good second there the run prior. Beautifully placed and is sure to play a major role. 1. ZOOMER BOOMER is a two-year-old filly from the Graham Dwyer yard on debut. A nice draw on the front line should ensure a cosy run. Showed some ability when a minor placegetter in a recent trial so anticipating a bright start to her career. 4. LIGHTYEAR is ready to improve this prep after debuting with a fourth four months ago over 1660m at Albion Park. 2. WANNABE ME is worth some thought after her last-start fourth over 1780m at this course on July 1. Include from the low draw.

runners.name: SOCIAL OUTING
runners.comment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 6th (Fr6) over 1780m at this track beaten 14 m by Red And Rich (2:13.20) on July 1 at $5. At his previous start solid effort when 2nd (Sr4) over 1850m after racing wide at Marburg, beaten a head by Vera Aguilera (2:17.80) on June 21 at $1.70. Sure to improve on the latest effort.

runners.name: WANNABE ME
runners.comment: Last start was well back in the run when 4th (Fr4) over 1780m at this track beaten 10 m by Red And Rich (2:13.20) on July 1 at $10. Before that, 6th (Fr4) over 1660m at Albion Park beaten 10 m by Crunchy Tuna (2:01.30) in 2yo on June 16 at $21. Capable of a better showing.

runners.name: FAN THE FLAME
runners.comment: Last start was seventh after being driven well back, behind Crunchy Tuna at Albion Park over 1660m in a 2yo on June 16 at $7.50. Raced better the start before that with a good run when 2nd (Fr3) over 1660m at Albion Park beaten 2.25 m by Genuine Star (1:59.70) in 2yo on June 9 at $12. Rates highly and from a much better draw can bounce back.

runners.name: ZOOMER BOOMER
runners.comment: Two-year-old filly (Bling It On - Rocky Bay Lass) making her debut. Finished third at Albion Park in a trial on June 30 over 1660m. Placed in a recent trial and expected to run well.

runners.name: LIGHTYEAR
runners.comment: Two-year-old colt facing the starter for the second time. At debut 4th (Fr5) over 1660m at Albion Park, beaten 30 m by San Luca (1:59.50) in 2yo on March 10 at $13. Can play a role in the finish.

runners.name: KISSED
runners.comment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 6th (Fr4) over 1780m at this track beaten 12 m by Awholelottahappy (2:12.50) on June 17 at $41. Two runs back 4th (Fr3) over 1850m at Marburg, beaten 30 m by Pretty Wicked (2:17.40) on June 7 at $31. Has the task ahead.

G:MNM:4:2026-07-08.comment: 4. NODUFF TROPICANA has been on speed at the last couple here and fought on to hit the frame, last outing finishing third beaten 0.7 lengths (29.13). Key chance in this line up. 6. WINTERFIELD BIRD has shown good improvement at her last two starts, most recently finishing 2nd at this track over 480m. Ran one of the fastest times on the program last start despite finishing in the minors. Expected to feature again. 3. SUGAR ROSE broke a string of placings finishing in the money three on end before a last start sixth (39.17) at this track. Solid record here winning four races. Should play a prominent role. 5. LONGACRES FEE must be respected despite an unplaced effort here most recently.

runners.name: LONGACRES FEE
runners.comment: Missed the frame last time but was in the minors two on end prior to that, the most recent when third (29.84) over 480m at this track. Tricky draw to overcome and looks a each way chance only this field.

runners.name: WINTERFIELD BIRD
runners.comment: Latest effort finished 2nd in an A7 on July 1 over 480m at this track behind Transfer Aaliyah beaten a neck (29.31). Has an excellent 28.69 best time at this course and distance. Big chance.

runners.name: MYSTICAL CASH
runners.comment: Turned in a fair debut over 480m at this track where he settled on speed and faded late to finish fourth (29.29). Likely to be much improved. Prepared to just watch this time.

runners.name: SUGAR ROSE
runners.comment: Was out of the placings last time at this track but prior to that had been racing consistently, notching three minors in a row. Tends to go fairly well off the draw but looks a each way chance only this field.

runners.name: NODUFF TROPICANA
runners.comment: Last start finished 3rd over 480m at this track beaten 0.7 lengths (29.13) behind Daves Blitz in an A7 on July 2. Has been racing well. Well placed here and looks a leading contender.

runners.name: STARMOUNT HERBIE
runners.comment: Turned in a fair debut over 480m at this track where he settled on speed and faded late to finish fifth (29.40). Further improved and drops down to the inside box this time. Failed to threaten last start and looks tested again.

R:MBS:11:2026-07-08.comment: 3. TAISEI SURGE is a talented entire who has been in the money at all four starts. Last appeared when he was successful over 1200m at this track on November 12. Has a very good record here with three wins from four starts. Right in this. 5. CHAMPION HORSE landed his maiden success over this course and distance last time, scoring by 1.5 lengths. Shaping up nicely and he is one of the main chances. 9. JASON BAROWS was comfortably accounted for when fourth last time out over 1200m here after a win at this track at the previous outing. Likely improver with strong prospects. 2. KOTCHAN went around over this course and distance last time and led from the outset to score by 1.5 lengths. Sure to be thereabouts.

runners.name: TEN X
runners.comment: At the latest run 8th of 12 at this track on June 18 over 1000m, 4.5 len behind Steel Fine carrying 56kg at $10.20. The race before that 4th of 12 at this track on June 4 over 1000m, 4 len behind Green Elixir carrying 56kg at $39.40. Fully tested on his recent run.

runners.name: TAISEI SURGE
runners.comment: Racing first-up today. Finished off last campaign winning by 0.5 len this track November 12 over 1200m defeating Kanetoshi Eterno with 57kg at $3.90. At his first start won by nose this track October 1 over 1200m defeating Dread Knight carrying 57kg at $1.90. Should be right in the finish.

runners.name: JASON BAROWS
runners.comment: Racing well recently. Last start tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 4th of 8 at this track on June 24 over 1200m, 5 len behind Star Of Moulin with 57kg at $5. The run before that ran on from midfield and won by 3 len at this track June 11 over 1200m defeating Kaseno Force carrying 57kg at $2.20. Capable of more ? worth another chance.

runners.name: KOTCHAN
runners.comment: Most recently won by 1.5 len at this track June 23 over 1200m defeating Emma Diamond with 55kg at $15.40. Before that struggled in the run home; ran last of 8 at this track on June 9 over 1200m, 6 len behind Kitasan Mondo carrying 57kg at $6. Definite winning chance. Keep safe.

runners.name: MERESANKH
runners.comment: Last start ran second last of 8 at this track on June 24 over 1200m, 8 len behind Star Of Moulin with 55kg at $38.40. The race before that 10th of 12 at this track on June 4 over 1800m, 14 len behind Meisho Hari Son with 55kg at $8.50. Fully tested on her recent run.

runners.name: BIG BAND BEAT
runners.comment: Returns from a 39-day let-up. Most recently 6th of 8 at Kochi on May 30 over 1300m, 14 len behind Meisho Fujitaka carrying 57kg at $30.50. The start before that 4th of 10 at Kochi on May 16 over 1400m, 4 len behind Meisho Hosen with 55kg at $15.20. Be tough to make an impression in this line-up.

runners.name: CHAMPION HORSE
runners.comment: Third-up today. Resuming 5th of 9 at this track on June 11 over 1200m, 6 len behind Jason Barows carrying 57kg at $35.70. Second run from a spell favourite; won by 1.5 len at this track June 23 over 1200m defeating Glorious Aspen carrying 57kg at $2.90. Found his best form now. Will take beating.

runners.name: FRONTIER BRIGHT
runners.comment: At the latest run won by a nose at this track June 25 over 1200m defeating Sarasa Go Sign with 57kg at $13. The race before that couldn't go on with it; 6th of 9 at this track on June 11 over 1200m, 6 len behind Jason Barows carrying 57kg at $6.50. Last-start winner who can measure up again.

runners.name: MISSION EYES
runners.comment: At the latest run eased back early on 4th of 7 at this track on June 25 over 1000m, 7 len behind Cilantro carrying 57kg at $52.50. Before that 6th of 11 at Nagoya on May 22 over 1500m, 6 len behind T O Lippmann with 57kg at $43.20. Not going well enough. Needs to lift.

R:SCV:3:2026-07-08.comment: 4. LENOXX is yet to break through after four career starts. Managed to fill a minor placing at this track two starts back before finishing fourth over 1200m at Greyville last start. Big chance to break through. 3. TIGER CODY has been in the placings four times from five starts in this maiden campaign, the latest as favourite over 1200m at Greyville All Weather when 1.2 lengths from the winner. He looks a genuine threat. 13. HOT BLOODED is facing the starter for the first time. By Trippi and comes from the Mike & Mathew De Kock stable. Expected to feature. 12. SEQUENTIAL faced the starter for the first time and finished fourth last start at Greyville All Weather over 1000m, beaten 6 lengths. Will take a lot from that last run and is worth following up.

runners.name: LENOXX
runners.comment: Recent form sound. At the latest run 4th of 9 at Greyville on June 13 over 1200m, 3.5 len behind Kid From The South carrying 60kg at $3.30. The run before that 2nd of 16 at this track on May 23 over 1200m, nose behind Tudor Rose carrying 60kg at $3. Go close on rating from two back. Sure to be right there at the business end.

runners.name: TIGER CODY
runners.comment: Recent form sound. Last start 3rd of 8 at Greyville All Weather on June 22 over 1200m, 1.2 len behind Diamond Maker carrying 57.5kg at $3. Before that 2nd of 8 at Greyville All Weather on June 10 over 1000m, nose behind Meeksha with 60kg at $4.50. Overdue for a win. Leading chance again.

runners.name: HOT BLOODED
runners.comment: Two-year-old gelding (Trippi - King's Temptress) making his debut. Expecting a bright start to his career.

runners.name: AFRICAN RUBY
runners.comment: Most recently ran last in a small field at Greyville on June 20 over 1200m, 2.75 len behind Better Never Ends with 58kg at $101. Before that 4th of 8 at this track on May 17 over 1000m, 3.5 len behind Stronger Together carrying 60kg at $21. Encouraging effort last start. In the mix.

runners.name: SEQUENTIAL
runners.comment: Was at a huge quote at debut, 4th of 12 at Greyville All Weather on May 20 over 1000m, 6 len behind Royal Crest carrying 60kg at $126. Wound up late on debut. Will have benefited from that outing and is likely to measure up.

runners.name: ARKADIN
runners.comment: Racing well recently. Last start 4th of 12 at Greyville on June 20 over 1400m, 2 len behind Dog Soldier with kg at $15. Before that 4th of 8 at Greyville All Weather on May 27 over 1000m, 5.5 len behind Bison Warrior carrying 60kg at $17. Should go well.

runners.name: GOLDEN RATIO
runners.comment: Third race start. First start 10th of 13 at this track on March 11 over 1200m, 14 len behind Flamethrower with 60kg at $17. Went for a spell before returning raced on the pace before fading ran last of 12 at Greyville on May 30 over 1400m, 10 len behind Coast Of The Sun with 60kg at $67. Needs to do a lot more.

runners.name: BULLET CATCH
runners.comment: First-starter by What A Winter out of Magic Trick. Market will be an invaluable guide.

runners.name: MEKONG
runners.comment: Resuming after a ten weeks break. Finished off last preparation second last of 8 at this track in the G3 April 29 over 1100m, 6 len behind Querari Dancer with 58.5kg at $76. On debut third of 9 at this track February 8 over 1000m, 2.25 len behind Durban Diamond carrying 60kg at $11. Likely to run well.

runners.name: KING BUD
runners.comment: First-starter by Pathfork out of Lola Bud. Prefer to see him at the races before recommending.

runners.name: ENCHANTING DREAM
runners.comment: At debut, ran second last of 8 at Greyville All Weather on June 17 over 1400m, 13 len behind What A Classic carrying 60kg at $7. Expecting a bit more with the race experience on board.

runners.name: MAJESTIC LIMPOPO
runners.comment: Resumes from a spell after only one run when ran last of 8 at Greyville All Weather on April 8 over 1200m, 40 len behind Bangladesh carrying 60kg at $51. Cannot make a strong case.

runners.name: AKIHITO
runners.comment: First-starter by Malmoos out of Netsuke. Prefer to see him under race conditions.

runners.name: PINKERTON'S SON
runners.comment: At the latest run 10th of 12 at Greyville on June 20 over 1400m, 12 len behind Dog Soldier with 60kg at $101. The start before that ran last of 8 at Greyville All Weather on June 13 over 1200m, 13 len behind Zagreb with 56.1kg at $126. Will need to improve many lengths to feature.

G:NOW:9:2026-07-08.comment: 3. BANDIT ALEX produced a dazzling 29.37 win over 520m at this track last start. Hard to top on the time from last start. 4. LOCO STORM finished second last start over 520m at this track but was game in defeat in a respectable 29.64. Top win latest and can measure up again. 5. ZULU SHARP has an excellent record here having never missed the placings in seven starts, including five wins and two placings. Comes off a (29.64) win last time, scoring by a nose in a Grade 5 over 520m at this track. Suited here and expected to run well. 1. SABINA SPARKLES did a good job to finish third last time out over 520m at this track (30.17) in a Grade 5, the second top-three finish on the trot.

runners.name: BANDIT ALEX
runners.comment: Strongly fancied last time and hit the ground running with a fast early split, paving the way for a 9 length win at this track over 520m in 29.37. Has run very fast time at this course and distance. Go close on his best form.

runners.name: LOCO BOOM
runners.comment: Lines up chasing another win after scoring over 520m at this track in 29.57, set up by a brilliant early sectional. Solid chance with even luck.

runners.name: LOCO STORM
runners.comment: In the money last time at this track (29.64) in a Grade 5, finishing a nose second. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and two minors. Leading chance.

runners.name: ZIPPING CHICAGO
runners.comment: Big odds last time but gave a huge sight after a fast early split, grabbed late but holding on to a placing when a 4 length third (29.92) over 520m at this track. Rates highly on best form. Must include.

runners.name: ZULU SHARP
runners.comment: Eye-catching performance racing just off the speed and going on to score by a nose in a Grade 5 last start at this track, recording a dynamic 29.64 over the 520m journey. Expected to go close again if runs up to latest time.

runners.name: SABINA SPARKLES
runners.comment: Hit the frame latest (30.17) when third at this track in a Grade 5. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed three times. With even luck and a clean start should be thereabouts.

runners.name: MAGGIE'S ETHICS
runners.comment: Drawn the outside box and could be suited with some luck. Goes ok at this track and distance but recent form not good enough, looking to others this time.

runners.name: UNSTOPPABLE MIST
runners.comment: Has hit the frame the last two starts, the latest at double figure odds when second (30.06) over 520m at this track. Drawn wide. Will need plenty of luck.

runners.name: ZIPPING SURREY
runners.comment: Finished third last time (30.31) over 520m at this track. Others preferred.

runners.name: ZIPPING SELKIRK
runners.comment: Has finished fourth at his last couple of starts, most recently at this track over 520m. Predicted to struggle on this occasion.

G:ROC:7:2026-07-08.comment: 5. FARMOR WHISKY jumped from the pinch last start to lead all the way and score (23.83) at this track in Maiden over 407m. Has hit winning form and can go on with it. 1. DOZEN DONUTS comes off an average performance last start when seventh at this track over 407m behind Super Special (25.51) in a Restricted WIN. Was in the money the start prior. Comes out of a solid form race last start. Cannot be underestimated. 8. VELOCITY GALAXY has hit the frame here at the last two runs, most recently finishing third beaten 2.25 lengths (24.12). Form from her last run is proving to be solid. Ready to find winning form. 2. AGRARI BEACH can return to form after missing the top-three at this circuit last time out.

runners.name: SUNBURNT DAWN
runners.comment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage sixth last time out over 407m at this track. Hard to have this time.

runners.name: AGRARI BEACH
runners.comment: Has finished fifth at this circuit at the last two appearances, most recently when beaten 6 lengths behind Sirius Todd over 407m. Must be included.

runners.name: FARMOR SENIOR
runners.comment: Lines up from box 7 for the first time after finishing a 15 length eighth at Townsville (22.88) in a Grade 5. Has ability and can sneak into the finish.

runners.name: FARMOR WHISKY
runners.comment: Strong performance on debut, showing plenty of speed to score by 5 lengths in a Maiden last start at this track, clocking a solid 23.83 over the 407m trip. Expected to go close again if runs up to latest time.

runners.name: TOUGH ONE
runners.comment: Last start finished seventh in a Grade 5 on June 10 over 407m at this track behind Clear Blue Sky, beaten 11 lengths (25.05). Hard to recommend this time.

runners.name: VELOCITY GALAXY
runners.comment: Has been in the minors the last two, the latest showing strong pace early but gathered in and finished a 2.25 lengths third over 407m this track in 24.12. Boxed on well at the latest run to hit the frame. Leading player.

runners.name: VELOCITY MOONLIT
runners.comment: Missed the frame last time but the start prior clocked a solid 21.95 over 380m finishing second at Townsville. Harder here and looks a place chance only.

runners.name: DOZEN DONUTS
runners.comment: Was out of placings last time (25.51) at this track in a Restricted WIN, finishing seventh and beaten 27 lengths. Has a win and two places from three starts from this draw. With a clean break looks hard to beat.

ref.race_name: WATCH PGR ON SKY SPORTS RACING STAKES

G:NAM:3:2026-07-08.comment: 4. SONIC PIXIE has a strong overall record having two wins and four places from nine starts including a last start success (18.54) over 305m at this track. Looks the testing material here. 5. JAYMIR TARA was in the placings last time but prior to that produced a quick 30.35 win over 500m at this track. Expected to feature on best figures. 3. DARING LAGANORE held his own to the line last start and filled a minor placing, beaten only 0.6 lengths (18.68) behind Swift Satisfy at this track. Expected to feature. 1. KELVA BRIE comes back from a let-up as a top three prospect.

runners.name: JAYMIR TARA
runners.comment: Finished off last campaign when second (30.66) over 500m at this track before a break of ten weeks. Has ability and expected to feature.

runners.name: SONIC PIXIE
runners.comment: Good performance to win by 2.25 lengths at this track over 305m (18.54) beating Mohican Trevor in D4 on July 1. Top chance again.

runners.name: SALEEN BRADY
runners.comment: Returns from a six-and-a-half months spell after being tipped out on the back of a fifth (29.23) over 462m at Great Yarmouth. Tough ask and looking to others.

runners.name: DARING LAGANORE
runners.comment: Working his way into winning form after his success on March 26 at this track over 305m. Last start was third over 305m in 18.68, behind Swift Satisfy. Hasn't been far away recently and can feature in the finish.

runners.name: ROUND THE BEND
runners.comment: Good effort at double-figure odds last time when second (18.67) over 305m at this track. Looking to others.

runners.name: KELVA BRIE
runners.comment: Missed the frame when fourth (18.49) at this track at last run and returns here after a ten weeks break. Placed at both tries fresh. Capable and looks an each way chance.

R:HAP:2:2026-07-08.comment: 1. ANOTHER ZONDA wasn't beaten far last time out, finishing 1.5L off the winner last start at this track and trip. He's since been back to the trials where he bolted in under Wong. She sticks with him now and her claims comes in handy. Back in grade now and can get back to winning form. 6. SHOOTING TO TOP has been solid from wide draws recently, getting across and sitting handy last start when ending up 3L off the winner. Now Purton hops on board and he continues to show talent as a lightly-raced 4YO. Can roll across from the deep again and bounce back to winning ways. 2. CHARMING LEGEND led last start and couldn't hold on, beaten 1L, but he beat home Shooting To Top on that occasion. Drawing inside again here helps and Moreira sticks with him. Should get every chance to go one better. 8. HAPPY SMILE can go to another level up in trip now and it wouldn't surprise to see him improve sharply.

runners.name: CHARMING LEGEND
runners.comment: Most recently gave a sight but was run down late 2nd of 12 at this track on June 24 over 1650m, 1.0 len behind Blossomy carrying 61kg at $17. Before that 11th of 13 at Sha Tin on May 24 over 1400m, 5.5 len behind The Red Hare carrying 53.5kg at $72. Drawn to enjoy a cosy run from an inside alley.

runners.name: HAPPY SMILE
runners.comment: At the latest run 6th of 13 at Sha Tin on June 21 over 1400m, 2.5 len behind Come Fast Fay Fay carrying 57.5kg at $33. The start before that 5th of 14 at Sha Tin on May 31 over 1200m, 2.75 len behind Papaya Brose with 57.5kg at $8.80. Can figure in the finish.

runners.name: ANOTHER ZONDA
runners.comment: Comes off a 35 day let-up. Most recently 4th of 12 at this track on June 3 over 1650m, 1.5 len behind Without Compare carrying 52.5kg at $21. Before that 8th of 12 at this track on May 20 over 1650m, 4 len behind Decision Link carrying 61kg at $12. Big chance to find winning form.

runners.name: CASA ROCHESTER
runners.comment: At the latest run settled back and ran on when 6th of 12 at this track on June 24 over 1650m, 3.5 len behind Flying Fortune carrying 61kg at $4.70. The run before that got back early 6th of 12 at this track on June 3 over 1650m, 2.5 len behind Without Compare carrying 52.5kg at $18. Key runner on his best form and can feature in the finish.

runners.name: SHOOTING TO TOP
runners.comment: Most recently 4th of 12 at this track on June 24 over 1650m, 3 len behind Blossomy with 59kg at $11. The start before that faded in the straight 5th of 12 at this track on May 13 over 1650m, 0.5 len behind The Azure carrying 60kg at $8.50. Well-placed and a big chance to atone.

runners.name: SURE JOYFUL
runners.comment: Last start rolled along in front before being edged out 3rd of 10 at this track on June 10 over 1650m, 1.75 len behind Legend Winner carrying 56kg at $27. Before that 10th of 12 at this track on May 20 over 1650m, 7 len behind Decision Link with 55.5kg at $16. Has ability and is one of the chances.

runners.name: THE LION KING
runners.comment: First-up. Finished off last preparation when last of 11 at Sha Tin All Weather May 6 over 1800m, 39 len behind Yoda's Choice carrying 56kg at $22. First up last campaign ran last of 12 at this track Rating 80 June 4 2025 over 1200m, 13 len behind Storm Rider carrying 56kg at $106. Others preferred.

runners.name: CHEAHA

KELVA BRIE comes back from a let-up as a top three prospect.

runners.name: JAYMIR TARA
runners.comment: Finished off last campaign when second (30.66) over 500m at this track before a break of ten weeks. Has ability and expected to feature.

R:HAP:2:2026-07-08.comment: 1. ANOTHER ZONDA wasn't beaten far last time out, finishing 1.5L off the winner last start at this track and trip. He's since been back to the trials where he bolted in under Wong. She sticks with him now and her claims comes in handy. Back in grade now and can get back to winning form. 6. SHOOTING TO TOP has been solid from wide draws recently, getting across and sitting handy last start when ending up 3L off the winner. Now Purton hops on board and he continues to show talent as a lightly-raced 4YO. Can roll across from the deep again and bounce back to winning ways. 2. CHARMING LEGEND led last start and couldn't hold on, beaten 1L, but he beat home Shooting To Top on that occasion. Drawing inside again here helps and Moreira sticks with him. Should get every chance to go one better. 8. HAPPY SMILE can go to another level up in trip now and it wouldn't surprise to see him improve sharply.

runners.name: CHARMING LEGEND
runners.comment: Most recently gave a sight but was run down late 2nd of 12 at this track on June 24 over 1650m, 1.0 len behind Blossomy carrying 61kg at $17. G:MEA:7:2026-07-08.comment: 8. SEGER hit the ground running with a slick early sectional but ran over late and missed the frame when a 2.25 lengths fourth (38.41) over 660m at Bendigo. Has claims if he runs up to expectations. 2. SOCIALISM missed the frame and was safely held latest finishing 6th at Ballarat following on from a third place finish (30.75) at this track the start prior. Should be about the money. 4. GLOWING ETHICS has been mixing form lately, hitting the frame two back before finishing sixth (35.26) at Sandown in a Grade 5. Expecting significant improvement this line-up. 5. TO PERU won by a wide margin last start. Hard to beat again.

runners.comment: Won over this track and trip. Last start finished 6th in a Restricted WIN on July 1 over 545m at Ballarat behind Starborn beaten 20 lengths (32.51). Capable of improvement on latest effort. Well placed and should feature.

runners.comment: Missed the frame last time but was in the minors two on end prior to that, the most recent when second (30.53) over 525m at this track. Tough draw to overcome and will need the right run to feature.

STUBBORN MOUSE has been in the money at her last two runs, most recently when second (22.21) in a Novice race over 381m at this track. Well placed here and can atone this time. 2. runners.comment: Was a winner three back at this track then finished in the minors before missing the frame last time when fourth (22.66) at this track. Well placed here and expected to bounce back.

runners.name: ELECTRIC KUNA
runners.comment: Ended last campaign with a fifth (35.33) in a NOV at this track and returns after a ten weeks break. Capable of playing a big role.

runners.comment: Finished second last start (17.44) at big odds over 300m at Mandurah. Gets the rails draw this time. Cannot be ruled out.

runners.name: MATTE BLACK

runners.name: BAND FOR BAND
runners.comment: Has finished last in her last couple of starts, most recently at this track over 381m. Capable of much better. Worth keeping safe.

H:RED:8:2026-07-08.comment: 5. FAN THE FLAME finished seventh last start over 1660m at Albion Park, beaten 21 metres, after a good second there the run prior. Beautifully placed and is sure to play a major role. 1. ZOOMER BOOMER is a two-year-old filly from the Graham Dwyer yard on debut. A nice draw on the front line should ensure a cosy run. Showed some ability when a minor placegetter in a recent trial so anticipating a bright start to her career. 4. LIGHTYEAR is ready to improve this prep after debuting with a fourth four months ago over 1660m at Albion Park. 2. WANNABE ME is worth some thought after her last-start fourth over 1780m at this course on July 1. Include from the low draw.

At his previous start solid effort when 2nd (Sr4) over 1850m after racing wide at Marburg, beaten a head by Vera Aguilera (2:17.80) on June 21 at $1.70. Sure to improve on the latest effort.

runners.name: WANNABE ME
runners.comment: Last start was well back in the run when 4th (Fr4) over 1780m at this track beaten 10 m by Red And Rich (2:13.20) on July 1 at $10. Before that, 6th (Fr4) over 1660m at Albion Park beaten 10 m by Crunchy Tuna (2:01.30) in 2yo on June 16 at $21. Capable of a better showing.

runners.comment: Last start was seventh after being driven well back, behind Crunchy Tuna at Albion Park over 1660m in a 2yo on June 16 at $7.50. G:MNM:4:2026-07-08.comment: 4. NODUFF TROPICANA has been on speed at the last couple here and fought on to hit the frame, last outing finishing third beaten 0.7 lengths (29.13). runners.comment: Turned in a fair debut over 480m at this track where he settled on speed and faded late to finish fourth (29.29). Likely to be much improved. Prepared to just watch this time.

runners.name: BULLET CATCH
runners.comment: First-starter by What A Winter out of Magic Trick. Market will be an invaluable guide.

runners.name: KING BUD

runners.name: AKIHITO
runners.comment: First-starter by Malmoos out of Netsuke. Prefer to see him under race conditions.

runners.name: PINKERTON'S SON
runners.comment: At the latest run 10th of 12 at Greyville on June 20 over 1400m, 12 len behind Dog Soldier with 60kg at $101. The start before that ran last of 8 at Greyville All Weather on June 13 over 1200m, 13 len behind Zagreb with 56.1kg at $126. Will need to improve many lengths to feature.

G:NOW:9:2026-07-08.comment: 3. BANDIT ALEX produced a dazzling 29.37 win over 520m at this track last start. Hard to top on the time from last start. 4. LOCO STORM finished second last start over 520m at this track but was game in defeat in a respectable 29.64. Top win latest and can measure up again. 5. ZULU SHARP has an excellent record here having never missed the placings in seven starts, including five wins and two placings. Comes off a (29.64) win last time, scoring by a nose in a Grade 5 over 520m at this track. Suited here and expected to run well. 1. SABINA SPARKLES did a good job to finish third last time out over 520m at this track (30.17) in a Grade 5, the second top-three finish on the trot.

runners.name: BANDIT ALEX
runners.comment: Strongly fancied last time and hit the ground running with a fast early split, paving the way for a 9 length win at this track over 520m in 29.37. Has run very fast time at this course and distance. Go close on his best form.

runners.name: LOCO BOOM
runners.comment: Lines up chasing another win after scoring over 520m at this track in 29.57, set up by a brilliant early sectional. Solid chance with even luck.

runners.name: LOCO STORM
runners.comment: In the money last time at this track (29.64) in a Grade 5, finishing a nose second. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and two minors. Leading chance.

runners.name: ZIPPING CHICAGO
runners.comment: Big odds last time but gave a huge sight after a fast early split, grabbed late but holding on to a placing when a 4 length third (29.92) over 520m at this track. Rates highly on best form. Must include.

runners.name: ZULU SHARP
runners.comment: Eye-catching performance racing just off the speed and going on to score by a nose in a Grade 5 last start at this track, recording a dynamic 29.64 over the 520m journey. Expected to go close again if runs up to latest time.

runners.name: SABINA SPARKLES
runners.comment: Hit the frame latest (30.17) when third at this track in a Grade 5. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed three times. With even luck and a clean start should be thereabouts.

runners.name: MAGGIE'S ETHICS
runners.comment: Drawn the outside box and could be suited with some luck. Goes ok at this track and distance but recent form not good enough, looking to others this time.

runners.name: UNSTOPPABLE MIST

runners.name: ZIPPING SURREY
runners.comment: Finished third last time (30.31) over 520m at this track. Others preferred.

runners.name: ZIPPING SELKIRK
runners.comment: Has finished fourth at his last couple of starts, most recently at this track over 520m. Predicted to struggle on this occasion.

G:ROC:7:2026-07-08.comment: 5. FARMOR WHISKY jumped from the pinch last start to lead all the way and score (23.83) at this track in Maiden over 407m. Has hit winning form and can go on with it. 1. DOZEN DONUTS comes off an average performance last start when seventh at this track over 407m behind Super Special (25.51) in a Restricted WIN. Was in the money the start prior. Comes out of a solid form race last start. Cannot be underestimated. 8. VELOCITY GALAXY has hit the frame here at the last two runs, most recently finishing third beaten 2.25 lengths (24.12). Form from her last run is proving to be solid. Ready to find winning form. 2. AGRARI BEACH can return to form after missing the top-three at this circuit last time out.

runners.name: SUNBURNT DAWN
runners.comment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage sixth last time out over 407m at this track. Hard to have this time.

runners.name: AGRARI BEACH
runners.comment: Has finished fifth at this circuit at the last two appearances, most recently when beaten 6 lengths behind Sirius Todd over 407m. Must be included.

runners.name: FARMOR SENIOR
runners.comment: Lines up from box 7 for the first time after finishing a 15 length eighth at Townsville (22.88) in a Grade 5. Has ability and can sneak into the finish.

runners.name: FARMOR WHISKY
runners.comment: Strong performance on debut, showing plenty of speed to score by 5 lengths in a Maiden last start at this track, clocking a solid 23.83 over the 407m trip. Expected to go close again if runs up to latest time.

runners.name: TOUGH ONE
runners.comment: Last start finished seventh in a Grade 5 on June 10 over 407m at this track behind Clear Blue Sky, beaten 11 lengths (25.05). Hard to recommend this time.

runners.name: VELOCITY GALAXY
runners.comment: Has been in the minors the last two, the latest showing strong pace early but gathered in and finished a 2.25 lengths third over 407m this track in 24.12. Boxed on well at the latest run to hit the frame. Leading player.

runners.comment: Missed the frame last time but the start prior clocked a solid 21.95 over 380m finishing second at Townsville. Harder here and looks a place chance only.

runners.name: DOZEN DONUTS
runners.comment: Was out of placings last time (25.51) at this track in a Restricted WIN, finishing seventh and beaten 27 lengths. Has a win and two places from three starts from this draw. With a clean break looks hard to beat.

G:NAM:3:2026-07-08.comment: 4. SONIC PIXIE has a strong overall record having two wins and four places from nine starts including a last start success (18.54) over 305m at this track. DARING LAGANORE held his own to the line last start and filled a minor placing, beaten only 0.6 lengths (18.68) behind Swift Satisfy at this track. Expected to feature. 1. KELVA BRIE comes back from a let-up as a top three prospect.

runners.name: JAYMIR TARA
runners.comment: Finished off last campaign when second (30.66) over 500m at this track before a break of ten weeks. Has ability and expected to feature.

runners.name: SONIC PIXIE

runners.comment: Good effort at double-figure odds last time when second (18.67) over 305m at this track. Looking to others.

runners.name: KELVA BRIE
runners.comment: Missed the frame when fourth (18.49) at this track at last run and returns here after a ten weeks break. Placed at both tries fresh. Capable and looks an each way chance.

R:HAP:2:2026-07-08.comment: 1. ANOTHER ZONDA wasn't beaten far last time out, finishing 1.5L off the winner last start at this track and trip. He's since been back to the trials where he bolted in under Wong. She sticks with him now and her claims comes in handy. Back in grade now and can get back to winning form. 6. SHOOTING TO TOP has been solid from wide draws recently, getting across and sitting handy last start when ending up 3L off the winner. Now Purton hops on board and he continues to show talent as a lightly-raced 4YO. Can roll across from the deep again and bounce back to winning ways. 2. CHARMING LEGEND led last start and couldn't hold on, beaten 1L, but he beat home Shooting To Top on that occasion. Drawing inside again here helps and Moreira sticks with him. Should get every chance to go one better. 8. HAPPY SMILE can go to another level up in trip now and it wouldn't surprise to see him improve sharply.

runners.name: CHARMING LEGEND
runners.comment: Most recently gave a sight but was run down late 2nd of 12 at this track on June 24 over 1650m, 1.0 len behind Blossomy carrying 61kg at $17. Before that 11th of 13 at Sha Tin on May 24 over 1400m, 5.5 len behind The Red Hare carrying 53.5kg at $72. Drawn to enjoy a cosy run from an inside alley.

runners.name: HAPPY SMILE
runners.comment: At the latest run 6th of 13 at Sha Tin on June 21 over 1400m, 2.5 len behind Come Fast Fay Fay carrying 57.5kg at $33. The start before that 5th of 14 at Sha Tin on May 31 over 1200m, 2.75 len behind Papaya Brose with 57.5kg at $8.80. Can figure in the finish.

runners.name: ANOTHER ZONDA
runners.comment: Comes off a 35 day let-up. Most recently 4th of 12 at this track on June 3 over 1650m, 1.5 len behind Without Compare carrying 52.5kg at $21. Before that 8th of 12 at this track on May 20 over 1650m, 4 len behind Decision Link carrying 61kg at $12. Big chance to find winning form.

runners.name: CASA ROCHESTER
runners.comment: At the latest run settled back and ran on when 6th of 12 at this track on June 24 over 1650m, 3.5 len behind Flying Fortune carrying 61kg at $4.70. The run before that got back early 6th of 12 at this track on June 3 over 1650m, 2.5 len behind Without Compare carrying 52.5kg at $18. Key runner on his best form and can feature in the finish.

runners.name: SHOOTING TO TOP
runners.comment: Most recently 4th of 12 at this track on June 24 over 1650m, 3 len behind Blossomy with 59kg at $11. The start before that faded in the straight 5th of 12 at this track on May 13 over 1650m, 0.5 len behind The Azure carrying 60kg at $8.50. Well-placed and a big chance to atone.

runners.name: SURE JOYFUL
runners.comment: Last start rolled along in front before being edged out 3rd of 10 at this track on June 10 over 1650m, 1.75 len behind Legend Winner carrying 56kg at $27. Before that 10th of 12 at this track on May 20 over 1650m, 7 len behind Decision Link with 55.5kg at $16. Has ability and is one of the chances.

runners.name: THE LION KING
runners.comment: First-up. Finished off last preparation when last of 11 at Sha Tin All Weather May 6 over 1800m, 39 len behind Yoda's Choice carrying 56kg at $22. First up last campaign ran last of 12 at this track Rating 80 June 4 2025 over 1200m, 13 len behind Storm Rider carrying 56kg at $106. Others preferred.

runners.name: CHEAHA
runners.comment: Last start 6th of 10 at this track on June 10 over 1650m, 4 len behind Legend Winner with 59.5kg at $11. The run before that 4th of 12 at this track on May 20 over 1200m, 0.8 len behind Vulcanus carrying 59kg at $11. Rates highly on his best performances and can bounce back.

runners.name: VIVA BOSS
runners.comment: At the latest run 4th of 10 at this track on June 10 over 1650m, 1.75 len behind Legend Winner carrying 53kg at $77. The run before that ran last of 12 at Sha Tin on May 17 over 1200m, 17 len behind Little Monster with 51kg at $48. Better effort last start but others rate better.

runners.name: AKERMANIS GOLD
runners.comment: At the latest run 9th of 14 at Sha Tin on June 13 over 1400m, 6 len behind Meaningful Dragon with 58.5kg at $34. Before that 6th of 14 at Sha Tin on May 24 over 1400m, 5 len behind Come Fast Fay Fay carrying 59.5kg at $70. Prepared to risk on recent form.

runners.name: REAL TIME
runners.comment: Second run back. First-up after three months ran second last of 14 at Sha Tin on June 21 over 1200m, 10 len behind Chicken Dinner with 50kg at $156. Previously second-up ran last of 12 at Sha Tin on April 6 over 1000m, 10 len behind Fast Responder carrying 55kg at $167. Can't recommend until he offers something more.

runners.name: CELESTIAL STRIDER
runners.comment: Last start ran second last of 12 at this track on June 10 over 1650m, 12 len behind Viva Firecracker carrying 54kg at $151. The start before that got back early 10th of 14 at Sha Tin on May 9 over 1400m, 12 len behind Invictus Dragon carrying 55kg at $115. Others preferred.

G:MEA:7:2026-07-08.comment: 8. SEGER hit the ground running with a slick early sectional but ran over late and missed the frame when a 2.25 lengths fourth (38.41) over 660m at Bendigo. Has claims if he runs up to expectations. 2. SOCIALISM missed the frame and was safely held latest finishing 6th at Ballarat following on from a third place finish (30.75) at this track the start prior. Should be about the money. 4. GLOWING ETHICS has been mixing form lately, hitting the frame two back before finishing sixth (35.26) at Sandown in a Grade 5. Expecting significant improvement this line-up. 5. TO PERU won by a wide margin last start. Hard to beat again.

runners.name: SEGER
runners.comment: Found some support last start but struggled and finished 4th over 660m at Bendigo beaten 2.25 lengths (38.41) behind Balding Sandy in a Restricted WIN H on June 5. Placed two back at Warrnambool. Capable of improvement on latest effort. Well placed and should feature.

runners.name: TO PERU
runners.comment: Good performance after tracking the speed to win by 1.75 lengths at Warragul over 460m (26.43) beating She's Salty in Rank Limit - Grade 5 on July 2. Ran one of the fastest times on the program in her latest win. Stay with her.

runners.name: SOCIALISM
runners.comment: Won over this track and trip. Last start finished 6th in a Restricted WIN on July 1 over 545m at Ballarat behind Starborn beaten 20 lengths (32.51). Capable of improvement on latest effort. Well placed and should feature.

runners.name: GLOWING ETHICS
runners.comment: Missed the frame last time but finished in the minors at big odds two back when second (34.98) over 600m at this track. Tough draw to overcome but is among the better hopes.

runners.name: MISS JECKELL
runners.comment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (35.42) in a Grade 5, finishing a 3 length fifth. Goes very well from the draw boasting three victories and six places from 15 starts. Looking to others.

runners.name: GREYSYND BONNIE
runners.comment: Missed the frame last time but was in the minors two on end prior to that, the most recent when second (30.53) over 525m at this track. Tough draw to overcome and will need the right run to feature.

G:CNP:2:2026-07-08.comment: 7. IMPRESS CARMEN looks close to another win after hitting the frame in a 6 length third (22.48) in a Novice race at this track. Racing well and deserves a win. 8. ORANA JET copped a check in the run and finished a well held 8 lengths fourth (22.66) last time in a Novice race at this track over 381m. Key player if finds best. 5. STUBBORN MOUSE has been in the money at her last two runs, most recently when second (22.21) in a Novice race over 381m at this track. Well placed here and can atone this time. 2. ELECTRIC KUNA is new to this distance but cannot be left out.

runners.name: ORANA JET
runners.comment: Was a winner three back at this track then finished in the minors before missing the frame last time when fourth (22.66) at this track. Well placed here and expected to bounce back.

runners.name: IMPRESS CARMEN
runners.comment: Well supported last time and gave a sight after a scorching early split but could only manage third, finishing 6 lengths back (22.48) over 381m at this track. Expected to go very well.

runners.name: ATHENIAN BLADE
runners.comment: Last start finished sixth on June 30 over 400m at Mandurah behind Chi Chi Doll, beaten 6 lengths (23.11) in a Novice race. Shouldn't trouble the top few hopes.

runners.name: STUBBORN MOUSE
runners.comment: Working her way into winning form after claiming her maiden success on May 27 at this track over 381m. Last start was second over 381m in 22.21, behind Send It Alfie. Forward showing expected.

runners.name: ELECTRIC KUNA
runners.comment: Ended last campaign with a fifth (35.33) in a NOV at this track and returns after a ten weeks break. Capable of playing a big role.

runners.name: MILWAUKEE MATES
runners.comment: Finished second last start (17.44) at big odds over 300m at Mandurah. Gets the rails draw this time. Cannot be ruled out.

runners.name: MATTE BLACK
runners.comment: Needs to do more than recent efforts, the latest a sixth over 488m at Mandurah. This looks too tough.

runners.name: BAND FOR BAND
runners.comment: Has finished last in her last couple of starts, most recently at this track over 381m. Capable of much better. Worth keeping safe.

H:RED:8:2026-07-08.comment: 5. FAN THE FLAME finished seventh last start over 1660m at Albion Park, beaten 21 metres, after a good second there the run prior. Beautifully placed and is sure to play a major role. 1. ZOOMER BOOMER is a two-year-old filly from the Graham Dwyer yard on debut. A nice draw on the front line should ensure a cosy run. Showed some ability when a minor placegetter in a recent trial so anticipating a bright start to her career. 4. LIGHTYEAR is ready to improve this prep after debuting with a fourth four months ago over 1660m at Albion Park. 2. WANNABE ME is worth some thought after her last-start fourth over 1780m at this course on July 1. Include from the low draw.

runners.name: SOCIAL OUTING
runners.comment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 6th (Fr6) over 1780m at this track beaten 14 m by Red And Rich (2:13.20) on July 1 at $5. At his previous start solid effort when 2nd (Sr4) over 1850m after racing wide at Marburg, beaten a head by Vera Aguilera (2:17.80) on June 21 at $1.70. Sure to improve on the latest effort.

runners.name: WANNABE ME
runners.comment: Last start was well back in the run when 4th (Fr4) over 1780m at this track beaten 10 m by Red And Rich (2:13.20) on July 1 at $10. Before that, 6th (Fr4) over 1660m at Albion Park beaten 10 m by Crunchy Tuna (2:01.30) in 2yo on June 16 at $21. Capable of a better showing.

runners.name: FAN THE FLAME
runners.comment: Last start was seventh after being driven well back, behind Crunchy Tuna at Albion Park over 1660m in a 2yo on June 16 at $7.50. Raced better the start before that with a good run when 2nd (Fr3) over 1660m at Albion Park beaten 2.25 m by Genuine Star (1:59.70) in 2yo on June 9 at $12. Rates highly and from a much better draw can bounce back.

runners.name: ZOOMER BOOMER
runners.comment: Two-year-old filly (Bling It On - Rocky Bay Lass) making her debut. Finished third at Albion Park in a trial on June 30 over 1660m. Placed in a recent trial and expected to run well.

runners.name: LIGHTYEAR
runners.comment: Two-year-old colt facing the starter for the second time. At debut 4th (Fr5) over 1660m at Albion Park, beaten 30 m by San Luca (1:59.50) in 2yo on March 10 at $13. Can play a role in the finish.

runners.name: KISSED
runners.comment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 6th (Fr4) over 1780m at this track beaten 12 m by Awholelottahappy (2:12.50) on June 17 at $41. Two runs back 4th (Fr3) over 1850m at Marburg, beaten 30 m by Pretty Wicked (2:17.40) on June 7 at $31. Has the task ahead.

G:MNM:4:2026-07-08.comment: 4. NODUFF TROPICANA has been on speed at the last couple here and fought on to hit the frame, last outing finishing third beaten 0.7 lengths (29.13). Key chance in this line up. 6. WINTERFIELD BIRD has shown good improvement at her last two starts, most recently finishing 2nd at this track over 480m. Ran one of the fastest times on the program last start despite finishing in the minors. Expected to feature again. 3. SUGAR ROSE broke a string of placings finishing in the money three on end before a last start sixth (39.17) at this track. Solid record here winning four races. Should play a prominent role. 5. LONGACRES FEE must be respected despite an unplaced effort here most recently.

runners.name: LONGACRES FEE
runners.comment: Missed the frame last time but was in the minors two on end prior to that, the most recent when third (29.84) over 480m at this track. Tricky draw to overcome and looks a each way chance only this field.

runners.name: WINTERFIELD BIRD
runners.comment: Latest effort finished 2nd in an A7 on July 1 over 480m at this track behind Transfer Aaliyah beaten a neck (29.31). Has an excellent 28.69 best time at this course and distance. Big chance.

runners.name: MYSTICAL CASH
runners.comment: Turned in a fair debut over 480m at this track where he settled on speed and faded late to finish fourth (29.29). Likely to be much improved. Prepared to just watch this time.

runners.name: SUGAR ROSE
runners.comment: Was out of the placings last time at this track but prior to that had been racing consistently, notching three minors in a row. Tends to go fairly well off the draw but looks a each way chance only this field.

runners.name: NODUFF TROPICANA
runners.comment: Last start finished 3rd over 480m at this track beaten 0.7 lengths (29.13) behind Daves Blitz in an A7 on July 2. Has been racing well. Well placed here and looks a leading contender.

runners.name: STARMOUNT HERBIE
runners.comment: Turned in a fair debut over 480m at this track where he settled on speed and faded late to finish fifth (29.40). Further improved and drops down to the inside box this time. Failed to threaten last start and looks tested again.

R:MBS:11:2026-07-08.comment: 3. TAISEI SURGE is a talented entire who has been in the money at all four starts. Last appeared when he was successful over 1200m at this track on November 12. Has a very good record here with three wins from four starts. Right in this. 5. CHAMPION HORSE landed his maiden success over this course and distance last time, scoring by 1.5 lengths. Shaping up nicely and he is one of the main chances. 9. JASON BAROWS was comfortably accounted for when fourth last time out over 1200m here after a win at this track at the previous outing. Likely improver with strong prospects. 2. KOTCHAN went around over this course and distance last time and led from the outset to score by 1.5 lengths. Sure to be thereabouts.

runners.name: TEN X
runners.comment: At the latest run 8th of 12 at this track on June 18 over 1000m, 4.5 len behind Steel Fine carrying 56kg at $10.20. The race before that 4th of 12 at this track on June 4 over 1000m, 4 len behind Green Elixir carrying 56kg at $39.40. Fully tested on his recent run.

runners.name: TAISEI SURGE
runners.comment: Racing first-up today. Finished off last campaign winning by 0.5 len this track November 12 over 1200m defeating Kanetoshi Eterno with 57kg at $3.90. At his first start won by nose this track October 1 over 1200m defeating Dread Knight carrying 57kg at $1.90. Should be right in the finish.

runners.name: JASON BAROWS
runners.comment: Racing well recently. Last start tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 4th of 8 at this track on June 24 over 1200m, 5 len behind Star Of Moulin with 57kg at $5. The run before that ran on from midfield and won by 3 len at this track June 11 over 1200m defeating Kaseno Force carrying 57kg at $2.20. Capable of more ? worth another chance.

runners.name: KOTCHAN
runners.comment: Most recently won by 1.5 len at this track June 23 over 1200m defeating Emma Diamond with 55kg at $15.40. Before that struggled in the run home; ran last of 8 at this track on June 9 over 1200m, 6 len behind Kitasan Mondo carrying 57kg at $6. Definite winning chance. Keep safe.

runners.name: MERESANKH
runners.comment: Last start ran second last of 8 at this track on June 24 over 1200m, 8 len behind Star Of Moulin with 55kg at $38.40. The race before that 10th of 12 at this track on June 4 over 1800m, 14 len behind Meisho Hari Son with 55kg at $8.50. Fully tested on her recent run.

runners.name: BIG BAND BEAT
runners.comment: Returns from a 39-day let-up. Most recently 6th of 8 at Kochi on May 30 over 1300m, 14 len behind Meisho Fujitaka carrying 57kg at $30.50. The start before that 4th of 10 at Kochi on May 16 over 1400m, 4 len behind Meisho Hosen with 55kg at $15.20. Be tough to make an impression in this line-up.

runners.name: CHAMPION HORSE
runners.comment: Third-up today. Resuming 5th of 9 at this track on June 11 over 1200m, 6 len behind Jason Barows carrying 57kg at $35.70. Second run from a spell favourite; won by 1.5 len at this track June 23 over 1200m defeating Glorious Aspen carrying 57kg at $2.90. Found his best form now. Will take beating.

runners.name: FRONTIER BRIGHT
runners.comment: At the latest run won by a nose at this track June 25 over 1200m defeating Sarasa Go Sign with 57kg at $13. The race before that couldn't go on with it; 6th of 9 at this track on June 11 over 1200m, 6 len behind Jason Barows carrying 57kg at $6.50. Last-start winner who can measure up again.

runners.name: MISSION EYES
runners.comment: At the latest run eased back early on 4th of 7 at this track on June 25 over 1000m, 7 len behind Cilantro carrying 57kg at $52.50. Before that 6th of 11 at Nagoya on May 22 over 1500m, 6 len behind T O Lippmann with 57kg at $43.20. Not going well enough. Needs to lift.

R:SCV:3:2026-07-08.comment: 4. LENOXX is yet to break through after four career starts. Managed to fill a minor placing at this track two starts back before finishing fourth over 1200m at Greyville last start. Big chance to break through. 3. TIGER CODY has been in the placings four times from five starts in this maiden campaign, the latest as favourite over 1200m at Greyville All Weather when 1.2 lengths from the winner. He looks a genuine threat. 13. HOT BLOODED is facing the starter for the first time. By Trippi and comes from the Mike & Mathew De Kock stable. Expected to feature. 12. SEQUENTIAL faced the starter for the first time and finished fourth last start at Greyville All Weather over 1000m, beaten 6 lengths. Will take a lot from that last run and is worth following up.

runners.name: LENOXX
runners.comment: Recent form sound. At the latest run 4th of 9 at Greyville on June 13 over 1200m, 3.5 len behind Kid From The South carrying 60kg at $3.30. The run before that 2nd of 16 at this track on May 23 over 1200m, nose behind Tudor Rose carrying 60kg at $3. Go close on rating from two back. Sure to be right there at the business end.

runners.name: TIGER CODY
runners.comment: Recent form sound. Last start 3rd of 8 at Greyville All Weather on June 22 over 1200m, 1.2 len behind Diamond Maker carrying 57.5kg at $3. Before that 2nd of 8 at Greyville All Weather on June 10 over 1000m, nose behind Meeksha with 60kg at $4.50. Overdue for a win. Leading chance again.

runners.name: HOT BLOODED
runners.comment: Two-year-old gelding (Trippi - King's Temptress) making his debut. Expecting a bright start to his career.

runners.name: AFRICAN RUBY
runners.comment: Most recently ran last in a small field at Greyville on June 20 over 1200m, 2.75 len behind Better Never Ends with 58kg at $101. Before that 4th of 8 at this track on May 17 over 1000m, 3.5 len behind Stronger Together carrying 60kg at $21. Encouraging effort last start. In the mix.

runners.name: SEQUENTIAL
runners.comment: Was at a huge quote at debut, 4th of 12 at Greyville All Weather on May 20 over 1000m, 6 len behind Royal Crest carrying 60kg at $126. Wound up late on debut. Will have benefited from that outing and is likely to measure up.

runners.name: ARKADIN
runners.comment: Racing well recently. Last start 4th of 12 at Greyville on June 20 over 1400m, 2 len behind Dog Soldier with kg at $15. Before that 4th of 8 at Greyville All Weather on May 27 over 1000m, 5.5 len behind Bison Warrior carrying 60kg at $17. Should go well.

runners.name: GOLDEN RATIO
runners.comment: Third race start. First start 10th of 13 at this track on March 11 over 1200m, 14 len behind Flamethrower with 60kg at $17. Went for a spell before returning raced on the pace before fading ran last of 12 at Greyville on May 30 over 1400m, 10 len behind Coast Of The Sun with 60kg at $67. Needs to do a lot more.

runners.name: BULLET CATCH
runners.comment: First-starter by What A Winter out of Magic Trick. Market will be an invaluable guide.

runners.name: MEKONG
runners.comment: Resuming after a ten weeks break. Finished off last preparation second last of 8 at this track in the G3 April 29 over 1100m, 6 len behind Querari Dancer with 58.5kg at $76. On debut third of 9 at this track February 8 over 1000m, 2.25 len behind Durban Diamond carrying 60kg at $11. Likely to run well.

runners.name: KING BUD
runners.comment: First-starter by Pathfork out of Lola Bud. Prefer to see him at the races before recommending.

runners.name: ENCHANTING DREAM
runners.comment: At debut, ran second last of 8 at Greyville All Weather on June 17 over 1400m, 13 len behind What A Classic carrying 60kg at $7. Expecting a bit more with the race experience on board.

runners.name: MAJESTIC LIMPOPO
runners.comment: Resumes from a spell after only one run when ran last of 8 at Greyville All Weather on April 8 over 1200m, 40 len behind Bangladesh carrying 60kg at $51. Cannot make a strong case.

runners.name: AKIHITO
runners.comment: First-starter by Malmoos out of Netsuke. Prefer to see him under race conditions.

runners.name: PINKERTON'S SON
runners.comment: At the latest run 10th of 12 at Greyville on June 20 over 1400m, 12 len behind Dog Soldier with 60kg at $101. The start before that ran last of 8 at Greyville All Weather on June 13 over 1200m, 13 len behind Zagreb with 56.1kg at $126. Will need to improve many lengths to feature.

G:NOW:9:2026-07-08.comment: 3. BANDIT ALEX produced a dazzling 29.37 win over 520m at this track last start. Hard to top on the time from last start. 4. LOCO STORM finished second last start over 520m at this track but was game in defeat in a respectable 29.64. Top win latest and can measure up again. 5. ZULU SHARP has an excellent record here having never missed the placings in seven starts, including five wins and two placings. Comes off a (29.64) win last time, scoring by a nose in a Grade 5 over 520m at this track. Suited here and expected to run well. 1. SABINA SPARKLES did a good job to finish third last time out over 520m at this track (30.17) in a Grade 5, the second top-three finish on the trot.

runners.name: BANDIT ALEX
runners.comment: Strongly fancied last time and hit the ground running with a fast early split, paving the way for a 9 length win at this track over 520m in 29.37. Has run very fast time at this course and distance. Go close on his best form.

runners.name: LOCO BOOM
runners.comment: Lines up chasing another win after scoring over 520m at this track in 29.57, set up by a brilliant early sectional. Solid chance with even luck.

runners.name: LOCO STORM
runners.comment: In the money last time at this track (29.64) in a Grade 5, finishing a nose second. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and two minors. Leading chance.

runners.name: ZIPPING CHICAGO
runners.comment: Big odds last time but gave a huge sight after a fast early split, grabbed late but holding on to a placing when a 4 length third (29.92) over 520m at this track. Rates highly on best form. Must include.

runners.name: ZULU SHARP
runners.comment: Eye-catching performance racing just off the speed and going on to score by a nose in a Grade 5 last start at this track, recording a dynamic 29.64 over the 520m journey. Expected to go close again if runs up to latest time.

runners.name: SABINA SPARKLES
runners.comment: Hit the frame latest (30.17) when third at this track in a Grade 5. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed three times. With even luck and a clean start should be thereabouts.

runners.name: MAGGIE'S ETHICS
runners.comment: Drawn the outside box and could be suited with some luck. Goes ok at this track and distance but recent form not good enough, looking to others this time.

runners.name: UNSTOPPABLE MIST
runners.comment: Has hit the frame the last two starts, the latest at double figure odds when second (30.06) over 520m at this track. Drawn wide. Will need plenty of luck.

runners.name: ZIPPING SURREY
runners.comment: Finished third last time (30.31) over 520m at this track. Others preferred.

runners.name: ZIPPING SELKIRK
runners.comment: Has finished fourth at his last couple of starts, most recently at this track over 520m. Predicted to struggle on this occasion.

G:ROC:7:2026-07-08.comment: 5. FARMOR WHISKY jumped from the pinch last start to lead all the way and score (23.83) at this track in Maiden over 407m. Has hit winning form and can go on with it. 1. DOZEN DONUTS comes off an average performance last start when seventh at this track over 407m behind Super Special (25.51) in a Restricted WIN. Was in the money the start prior. Comes out of a solid form race last start. Cannot be underestimated. 8. VELOCITY GALAXY has hit the frame here at the last two runs, most recently finishing third beaten 2.25 lengths (24.12). Form from her last run is proving to be solid. Ready to find winning form. 2. AGRARI BEACH can return to form after missing the top-three at this circuit last time out.

runners.name: SUNBURNT DAWN
runners.comment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage sixth last time out over 407m at this track. Hard to have this time.

runners.name: AGRARI BEACH
runners.comment: Has finished fifth at this circuit at the last two appearances, most recently when beaten 6 lengths behind Sirius Todd over 407m. Must be included.

runners.name: FARMOR SENIOR
runners.comment: Lines up from box 7 for the first time after finishing a 15 length eighth at Townsville (22.88) in a Grade 5. Has ability and can sneak into the finish.

runners.name: FARMOR WHISKY
runners.comment: Strong performance on debut, showing plenty of speed to score by 5 lengths in a Maiden last start at this track, clocking a solid 23.83 over the 407m trip. Expected to go close again if runs up to latest time.

runners.name: VELOCITY MOONLIT
runners.comment: Missed the frame last time but the start prior clocked a solid 21.95 over 380m finishing second at Townsville. Harder here and looks a place chance only.

runners.name: TOUGH ONE
runners.comment: Last start finished seventh in a Grade 5 on June 10 over 407m at this track behind Clear Blue Sky, beaten 11 lengths (25.05). Hard to recommend this time.

runners.name: VELOCITY GALAXY
runners.comment: Has been in the minors the last two, the latest showing strong pace early but gathered in and finished a 2.25 lengths third over 407m this track in 24.12. Boxed on well at the latest run to hit the frame. Leading player.

runners.name: DOZEN DONUTS
runners.comment: Was out of placings last time (25.51) at this track in a Restricted WIN, finishing seventh and beaten 27 lengths. Has a win and two places from three starts from this draw. With a clean break looks hard to beat.

SHOOTING TO TOP has been solid from wide draws recently, getting across and sitting handy last start when ending up 3L off the winner. Now Purton hops on board and he continues to show talent as a lightly-raced 4YO. Can roll across from the deep again and bounce back to winning ways. 2. CHARMING LEGEND led last start and couldn't hold on, beaten 1L, but he beat home Shooting To Top on that occasion. Drawing inside again here helps and Moreira sticks with him. Should get every chance to go one better. 8. HAPPY SMILE can go to another level up in trip now and it wouldn't surprise to see him improve sharply.

Should get every chance to go one better. 8. HAPPY SMILE can go to another level up in trip now and it wouldn't surprise to see him improve sharply.

Went for a spell before returning raced on the pace before fading ran last of 12 at Greyville on May 30 over 1400m, 10 len behind Coast Of The Sun with 60kg at $67. Needs to do a lot more.

runners.name: BULLET CATCH
runners.comment: First-starter by What A Winter out of Magic Trick. Market will be an invaluable guide.

runners.name: MEKONG
runners.comment: Resuming after a ten weeks break. Finished off last preparation second last of 8 at this track in the G3 April 29 over 1100m, 6 len behind Querari Dancer with 58.5kg at $76. On debut third of 9 at this track February 8 over 1000m, 2.25 len behind Durban Diamond carrying 60kg at $11. Likely to run well.

runners.name: KING BUD
runners.comment: First-starter by Pathfork out of Lola Bud. Prefer to see him at the races before recommending.

runners.name: ENCHANTING DREAM
runners.comment: At debut, ran second last of 8 at Greyville All Weather on June 17 over 1400m, 13 len behind What A Classic carrying 60kg at $7. Expecting a bit more with the race experience on board.

runners.name: MAJESTIC LIMPOPO
runners.comment: Resumes from a spell after only one run when ran last of 8 at Greyville All Weather on April 8 over 1200m, 40 len behind Bangladesh carrying 60kg at $51. Cannot make a strong case.

runners.name: AKIHITO
runners.comment: First-starter by Malmoos out of Netsuke. Prefer to see him under race conditions.

runners.name: PINKERTON'S SON
runners.comment: At the latest run 10th of 12 at Greyville on June 20 over 1400m, 12 len behind Dog Soldier with 60kg at $101. The start before that ran last of 8 at Greyville All Weather on June 13 over 1200m, 13 len behind Zagreb with 56.1kg at $126. Will need to improve many lengths to feature.

G:NOW:9:2026-07-08.comment: 3. BANDIT ALEX produced a dazzling 29.37 win over 520m at this track last start. Hard to top on the time from last start. 4. LOCO STORM finished second last start over 520m at this track but was game in defeat in a respectable 29.64. Top win latest and can measure up again. 5. ZULU SHARP has an excellent record here having never missed the placings in seven starts, including five wins and two placings. Comes off a (29.64) win last time, scoring by a nose in a Grade 5 over 520m at this track. Suited here and expected to run well. 1. SABINA SPARKLES did a good job to finish third last time out over 520m at this track (30.17) in a Grade 5, the second top-three finish on the trot.

runners.name: BANDIT ALEX
runners.comment: Strongly fancied last time and hit the ground running with a fast early split, paving the way for a 9 length win at this track over 520m in 29.37. Has run very fast time at this course and distance. Go close on his best form.

runners.name: LOCO BOOM
runners.comment: Lines up chasing another win after scoring over 520m at this track in 29.57, set up by a brilliant early sectional. Solid chance with even luck.

runners.name: LOCO STORM
runners.comment: In the money last time at this track (29.64) in a Grade 5, finishing a nose second. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and two minors. Leading chance.

runners.name: ZIPPING CHICAGO
runners.comment: Big odds last time but gave a huge sight after a fast early split, grabbed late but holding on to a placing when a 4 length third (29.92) over 520m at this track. Rates highly on best form. Must include.

runners.name: ZULU SHARP
runners.comment: Eye-catching performance racing just off the speed and going on to score by a nose in a Grade 5 last start at this track, recording a dynamic 29.64 over the 520m journey. Expected to go close again if runs up to latest time.

runners.name: SABINA SPARKLES
runners.comment: Hit the frame latest (30.17) when third at this track in a Grade 5. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed three times. With even luck and a clean start should be thereabouts.

runners.name: MAGGIE'S ETHICS
runners.comment: Drawn the outside box and could be suited with some luck. Goes ok at this track and distance but recent form not good enough, looking to others this time.

runners.name: UNSTOPPABLE MIST
runners.comment: Has hit the frame the last two starts, the latest at double figure odds when second (30.06) over 520m at this track. Drawn wide. Will need plenty of luck.

runners.name: ZIPPING SURREY
runners.comment: Finished third last time (30.31) over 520m at this track. Others preferred.

runners.name: ZIPPING SELKIRK
runners.comment: Has finished fourth at his last couple of starts, most recently at this track over 520m. Predicted to struggle on this occasion.

G:ROC:7:2026-07-08.comment: 5. FARMOR WHISKY jumped from the pinch last start to lead all the way and score (23.83) at this track in Maiden over 407m. Has hit winning form and can go on with it. 1. DOZEN DONUTS comes off an average performance last start when seventh at this track over 407m behind Super Special (25.51) in a Restricted WIN. Was in the money the start prior. Comes out of a solid form race last start. Cannot be underestimated. 8. VELOCITY GALAXY has hit the frame here at the last two runs, most recently finishing third beaten 2.25 lengths (24.12). Form from her last run is proving to be solid. Ready to find winning form. 2. AGRARI BEACH can return to form after missing the top-three at this circuit last time out.

runners.name: FARMOR SENIOR
runners.comment: Lines up from box 7 for the first time after finishing a 15 length eighth at Townsville (22.88) in a Grade 5. Has ability and can sneak into the finish.

runners.name: SUNBURNT DAWN
runners.comment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage sixth last time out over 407m at this track. Hard to have this time.

runners.name: AGRARI BEACH
runners.comment: Has finished fifth at this circuit at the last two appearances, most recently when beaten 6 lengths behind Sirius Todd over 407m. Must be included.

runners.name: FARMOR WHISKY
runners.comment: Strong performance on debut, showing plenty of speed to score by 5 lengths in a Maiden last start at this track, clocking a solid 23.83 over the 407m trip. Expected to go close again if runs up to latest time.

runners.name: VELOCITY MOONLIT
runners.comment: Missed the frame last time but the start prior clocked a solid 21.95 over 380m finishing second at Townsville. Harder here and looks a place chance only.

runners.name: VELOCITY GALAXY
runners.comment: Has been in the minors the last two, the latest showing strong pace early but gathered in and finished a 2.25 lengths third over 407m this track in 24.12. Boxed on well at the latest run to hit the frame. Leading player.

runners.name: DOZEN DONUTS
runners.comment: Was out of placings last time (25.51) at this track in a Restricted WIN, finishing seventh and beaten 27 lengths. Has a win and two places from three starts from this draw. With a clean break looks hard to beat.

runners.name: TOUGH ONE
runners.comment: Last start finished seventh in a Grade 5 on June 10 over 407m at this track behind Clear Blue Sky, beaten 11 lengths (25.05). Hard to recommend this time.
